zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Poynings 5th Baron Poynings於1382年12月3日出生在英國多瑟特奧可福德 費次潘時，他的父親Richard Poynings27歲，母親Isabel FitzPayn21歲。他於1397年10月22日之前與Eleanor Grey結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1446年10月2日在法國奧爾萊納薩奧爾萊安斯享年63歲，埋葬在法國奧爾萊納薩奧爾萊安斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Poynings 5th Baron Poynings于1382年12月3日出生在英国多瑟特奧可福德 費次潘时，他的父亲Richard Poynings27岁，母亲Isabel FitzPayn21岁。他于1397年10月22日之前与Eleanor Grey结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1446年10月2日在法国奧爾萊納薩奧爾萊安斯享年63岁，埋葬在法国奧爾萊納薩奧爾萊安斯。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Poynings 5th Baron Poynings was born on 3 December 1382, in Okeford Fitzpaine, Dorset, England, his father, Richard Poynings, was 27 and his mother, Isabel FitzPayn, was 21. He married Eleanor Grey before 22 October 1397. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 2 October 1446, in Orléans, Orléanais, France, at the age of 63, and was buried in Orléans, Orléanais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Poynings 5th Baron Poynings est né le 3 décembre 1382, à Okeford Fitzpaine, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Richard Poynings, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabel FitzPayn, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Grey avant 22 octobre 1397. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 2 octobre 1446, à Orléans, Orléanais, France, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Orléans, Orléanais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Poynings 5th Baron Poynings am 3. Dezember 1382 in Okeford Fitzpaine, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Poynings 27 und seine Mutter Isabel FitzPayn 21. Er hat vor 22. Oktober 1397 Eleanor Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 2. Oktober 1446 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Orléans, Orléanais, Frankreich und wurde in Orléans, Orléanais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Poynings 5th Baron Poynings è nato il il 3 dicembre 1382 nel Okeford Fitzpaine, Dorset, England, il suo padre, Richard Poynings, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Isabel FitzPayn, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Grey prima del 22 ottobre 1397. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 2 ottobre 1446, nel Orléans, Orléanais, Francia, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Orléans, Orléanais, Francia.

Ele casou-se com Eleanor Grey antes 22 de outubro de 1397. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 2 de outubro de 1446, em Orléans, Orléanais, França, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Orléans, Orléanais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Poynings 5th Baron Poynings родился 3 декабря 1382 г. в местности окефорд фицпеин, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Poynings было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel FitzPayn, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Grey перед 22 октябрь 1397 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 2 октября 1446 г. в местности орлeанс, орлeанеи, Франция в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности орлeанс, орлeанеи, Франция.
